results.title: Cargill Looks To Exit Its Metals Trading Business
Cochin Shipyard shares fall 3% amid buzz around OFS at 8% discount
results.description: Cochin Shipyard shares dipped Monday following reports of a potential government Offer for Sale (OFS) at a discount. The government, aiming to raise funds, is reportedly planning to sell a stake soon, adding to recent disinvestment activities in other public sector undertakings. Despite a recent stock decline, the company has shown strong long-term returns and improved operational efficiency in its latest earnings report.

results.title: Rotherham Council falling behind on housing target
results.description: A NEW housing report has shown that Rotherham Council appears to be falling behind on the government’s target of building 1,111 new homes each year.

results.title: West Bengal hikes DA to 38% for state employees; 7th Pay Commission implementation in focus
results.description: Finance Minister Swapan Dasgupta announced the hike while presenting West Bengal’s first budget under the BJP-led government.

results.title: Starmer announces resignation as UK PM, successor to take over by September
results.description: Starmer announces resignation as UK PM, successor to take over by September
